checks.description: After a one‑cycle reset pulse, the output must return to a defined non‑X, non‑Z value within a few clock cycles.
checks.pass_condition: No X or Z appears on out for at least three consecutive cycles following the reset glitch.
checks.trigger_condition: When a single‑cycle high pulse on rst is detected.

checks.description: Require that the LFSR output changes at least once after reset release, demonstrating progress.
checks.pass_condition: The value of out differs from its initial post‑reset value on at least one sampled clock edge within five cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is deasserted and the clock is running.
